title: Mek Energistics
description: Mek Energistics adds AE2-connected Mekanism machines that process encoded patterns, use AE power, and return completed products to the ME network.
body:
Mek Energistics adds AE2-connected Mekanism machines that can store encoded patterns, accept crafting requests from the ME network, use AE power, and return completed products directly to ME storage.

# Features
- Adds ME variants of Mekanism machines.
- Adds ME factories and a ME Factory Installer for upgrading supported Mekanism machines.
- Built-in pattern provider assembly for AE2 encoded patterns.
- Supports returning item, fluid, and chemical outputs to the ME network.
- Supports AE power usage while keeping FE compatibility.
- Preserves Mekanism-style GUIs, side configuration, upgrades, and configurator behavior..
## Compatibility
Required:

- Applied Energistics 2
- Mekanism
- Applied Mekanistics
  
Optional integrations:

- Mekanism Extras
- Mekanism More Machine

Mek Energistics is designed for players who want Mekanism processing machines to work naturally inside AE2 autocrafting setups without relying on separate pattern providers for every machine.
